info.title: Microsoft.Compute
info.description: Microsoft.Compute ScheduledActions Resource Provider management API.

get.description: List the operations for the provider
Get the status of a ScheduledActions asynchronous operation. Both the `Azure-AsyncOperation` and `Location` headers returned by long-running operations point at this endpoint.
List ScheduledAction resources by subscription ID
List ScheduledAction resources by resource group

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

innererror.description: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

Azure.Core.Foundations.InnerError.description: An object containing more specific information about the error. As per Azure REST API guidelines - https://aka.ms/AzureRestApiGuidelines#handling-errors.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

Azure.ResourceManager.ResourceProvisioni.description: The provisioning state of a resource type.

CancelOccurrenceRequest.description: The request to cancel an occurrence.

resourceIds.description: The resources the cancellation should act on. If no resource is passed in the list, Scheduled Action will cancel the occurrence for all resources.

DayOfTheMonth.description: Represents the possible days in a month

DeadlineType.description: The types of deadlines supported by ScheduledActions

values.name: InitiateAt
values.description: Initiate the operation at the given deadline.

values.name: CompleteBy
values.description: Complete the operation by the given deadline.

DelayRequest.description: Request to ask for a delay in an occurrence, delay should be set to client local time eg (ACST) 2025-05-30T22:03:00+09:30, (PST) 2025-05-30T06:35:00-07:00

delay.description: The exact time to delay the operations to

resourceIds.description: The resources that should be delayed. If empty, the delay will apply to the all resources in the occurrence.

ExecutionParameters.description: Extra details needed to run the user's request

optimizationPreference.description: Details that could optimize the user's request

retryPolicy.description: Retry policy the user can pass

Month.description: Representation of the months available selection in a gregorian calendar

NotificationProperties.description: The information about notifications to be send to about upcoming operations.

destination.description: Where the notification should be sent. For email, it should follow email format.

type.description: Type of notification to be sent.

language.description: The language the notification should be sent on.

disabled.description: Tells if the notification is enabled or not.

resourceNotificationSettings.description: The notification settings for the scheduled action at a resource level. Resource level notification settings are scope to specific resources only and submitted through attach requests.

ScheduledActionsId.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

ScheduledActionsSchedule.description: Specify the schedule in which the scheduled action is supposed to follow

scheduledTime.description: The time the scheduled action is supposed to run on

timeZone.description: The timezone the scheduled time is specified on

requestedWeekDays.description: The week days the scheduled action is supposed to run on. If empty, it means it will run on every week day.

requestedMonths.description: The months the scheduled action is supposed to run on. If empty, it means it will run on every month.

requestedDaysOfTheMonth.description: The days of the month the scheduled action is supposed to run on. If empty, it means it will run on every day of the month.

executionParameters.description: The execution parameters the scheduled action is supposed to follow

deadlineType.description: The type of deadline the scheduled action is supposed to follow for the schedule. If no value is passed, it will default to InitiateAt.

ValidScheduledActionResourceId.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

WeekDay.description: Representation of the possible selection of days in a week in a gregorian calendar
